nasb.text: And the smoke of the incense, with the prayers of the saints, went up before God out of the angel’s hand.

esv.text: and the smoke of the incense, with the prayers of the saints, rose before God from the hand of the angel.

cnv.text: 那香的煙和眾聖徒的祈禱，就從天使手中一同升到　神面前。

ccb.text: 这香发出的烟，连同众圣徒的祷告从那天使的手中向上升，直达上帝面前。

csbs.text: 那香的烟和圣徒们的祷告，从天使的手中升到神的面前。
